# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- For this repository, set up open-source GitHub defaults with MIT licensing and NuGet package publishing support.
- Implement modern-only .NET 10 + C# 14, avoiding backward-compatibility patterns. Use functional APIs and ensure explicit implementation of all requested components.
- Structure the repository in an OSS-style layout aligned with the SharpCoreDB structure, including directories like `src`, `.github`, and `docs`, and reflect this in the Visual Studio solution structure.
